addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Video package
Added administrator component for managing video libraries
Added video categories with unlimited hierarchy support
Added automatic thumbnail and poster image support
Added search, filtering and ordering options
Added complete JSON backup and restore
Added maintenance and cache management tools
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support
Added automatic image optimization during upload
Added automatic image resize with configurable maximum dimensions
Added automatic safe filename generation for uploaded images

change.item: Video architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Optimized for editorial websites, news portals, video libraries and high-traffic environments
Video thumbnails uploaded through the component are automatically optimized while existing Media Manager images remain untouched
Video Settings and administrator tools follow the common DevArt component architecture for improved usability and consistency

security.item: Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added secure JSON import and export validation
Added parameterized database queries throughout the component
Added safe file upload validation and image processing
Added safe output escaping throughout frontend rendering

note.item: Initial public production release of DevArt Video
Built exclusively for Joomla 6 with PHP 8.2+
No database migration required for new installations
JSON backup and restore provides complete site portability
Native integration with DevArt Slider and DevArt Widgets
Always test upgrades on a staging environment before production deployment
